categories.name: Term Insurance
categories.eligibility: Minimum age 18 years, Maximum age up to 65 years. Policy term can range from 5 to 40 years.
benefits: High life cover at very low premiums.
Financial security for the family in case of the policyholder's death.
Tax benefits under Section 80C.
Optional riders like accidental death benefit and critical illness cover.
Death benefit paid as a lump sum or monthly income.
categories.waiting_period: No waiting period for death benefit (except suicide in the first 12 months).
exclusions: Suicide within the first year of the policy.
Death due to participation in illegal acts.
Death due to war or nuclear explosion.
Self-inflicted injuries.
categories.claim_process: 1. Nominee informs the insurer about the death. 2. Submit death certificate and claim form. 3. Insurer verifies the claim. 4. Payout is processed to the nominee's bank account.
documents_required: Medical reports (if death was due to illness)
categories.tax_savings: Premiums paid are tax-exempt up to ₹1.5 Lakh under Section 80C. The death benefit received by the nominee is tax-free under Section 10(10D).
categories.free_look_period: 15 to 30 days from the receipt of the policy document to review and cancel if unsatisfied.
categories.renewal_terms: Annual renewal required. A grace period of 15 to 30 days is typically provided for premium payment after the due date.

categories.name: Investment Plans
categories.eligibility: Available for individuals aged 18 to 60 years. Can be started for minors by parents/legal guardians.
benefits: Wealth creation over a long period.
Market-linked returns (ULIPs) or guaranteed returns (Endowment).
Life cover along with investment growth.
Tax benefits on both investment and maturity.
Flexibility to switch between funds (in ULIPs).
categories.waiting_period: Lock-in period of 5 years for ULIPs. No specific waiting period for the life cover component.
exclusions: Market risks associated with investments in ULIPs.
Suicide exclusion for the life cover component in the first year.
Partial withdrawals not allowed during the initial lock-in period.
categories.claim_process: 1. Submit maturity claim form or death claim form. 2. Provide original policy document and bank details. 3. Insurer verifies and processes payment. 4. Funds transferred via NEFT.
categories.tax_savings: Tax benefits under Section 80C for premiums. Maturity proceeds are generally tax-free under Section 10(10D) if the premium is less than 10% of sum insured.
categories.free_look_period: 15 days for physical policies and 30 days for policies sourced through electronic/distance marketing.
categories.renewal_terms: Policy remains active as long as premiums are paid. Grace period of 30 days for annual payment modes.

categories.name: Saving Plans
categories.eligibility: Minimum age 18 years, Maximum age 60 years. Suitable for conservative investors seeking safety.
benefits: Guaranteed maturity benefits and bonuses.
Disciplined savings with life insurance protection.
Tax-free returns under Section 10(10D).
Loan facility available against the policy after a few years.
Fixed returns regardless of market volatility.
categories.waiting_period: Generally no waiting period for life cover. Maturity benefit paid at the end of the policy term.
exclusions: Lower returns compared to market-linked plans.
High surrender charges if the policy is closed before a certain period.
Suicide exclusion in the first year.
categories.claim_process: 1. Notify insurer on maturity or death. 2. Submit policy bond and ID proofs. 3. Insurer processes the payout based on policy terms. 4. Funds credited directly to the bank.
categories.tax_savings: Deductions under Section 80C for premiums paid. Maturity proceeds are generally tax-free under Section 10(10D).
categories.free_look_period: 15 days from the date of policy document receipt.
categories.renewal_terms: Regular premium payments required to keep the policy in force. Grace period of 30 days for annual modes.

categories.name: Individual Health Insurance
categories.eligibility: Individuals between 18 to 65 years. Children above 91 days can be covered as dependents.
benefits: Personalized coverage for a single person.
Cashless treatment in over 10,000+ network hospitals.
Pre and post-hospitalization expense coverage.
No-claim bonus (NCB) for every claim-free year.
Annual health check-ups and tax savings under 80D.
categories.waiting_period: 30 days initial waiting period. 2-4 years for pre-existing diseases. 1-2 years for specific illnesses (like Hernia, Cataract).
exclusions: Cosmetic or aesthetic treatments.
Injuries due to self-harm or suicide attempts.
Addiction-related treatments (alcohol, drugs).
Congenital external diseases or defects.
categories.claim_process: 1. For Cashless: Inform TPA at network hospital. 2. For Reimbursement: Submit all bills and discharge summary within 15 days of discharge.
categories.tax_savings: Deduction up to ₹25,000 (Self/Family) and additional ₹25,000-₹50,000 for parents under Section 80D.
categories.free_look_period: 15 days for a 1-year policy term to review the coverage.
categories.renewal_terms: Life-long renewability is guaranteed. A grace period of 30 days is given for renewal after expiry.

categories.name: Family Floater Insurance
categories.eligibility: Covers self, spouse, children, and sometimes dependent parents. Adult entry age 18-65 years.
benefits: Single policy for the entire family with shared sum insured.
More affordable than individual policies for multiple members.
Automatic restoration of sum insured if exhausted during the year.
Maternity and newborn cover available as optional add-ons.
All family members get access to cashless network hospitals.
categories.waiting_period: Same as individual health (30 days initial, 2-4 years for PED).
exclusions: Treatment for infertility or maternity (unless specific add-on is chosen).
Non-medical expenses like registration fees or administrative charges.
Pre-existing diseases not disclosed during policy purchase.
categories.claim_process: 1. Any insured family member can initiate a claim. 2. Cashless at network hospitals or reimbursement process. 3. Total sum insured shared across all members.
categories.tax_savings: Tax deduction up to ₹25,000 - ₹75,000 under Section 80D depending on the age of family members.
categories.free_look_period: 15 days to review terms and conditions from the date of receipt.
categories.renewal_terms: Life-long renewability. Premiums may increase as the eldest member enters a higher age bracket.

categories.name: Critical Illness Insurance
categories.eligibility: Individuals aged 18 to 65 years. Often requires a pre-policy medical check-up.
benefits: Lump-sum payment upon diagnosis of a covered illness (e.g., Cancer, Heart Attack).
Payout can be used for treatment, debt repayment, or loss of income.
Works as a supplement to your regular health insurance.
Covers expensive treatments not fully covered by standard plans.
Fixed benefit regardless of actual hospital bills incurred.
categories.waiting_period: Generally 90 days from the policy start date. A survival period (usually 30 days) is required after diagnosis.
exclusions: Critical illnesses diagnosed within the initial 90-day waiting period.
Conditions due to smoking or tobacco use (for specific respiratory/cancer covers).
Pre-existing critical conditions or congenital diseases.
Self-inflicted injuries or attempted suicide.
categories.claim_process: 1. Diagnosis of covered illness. 2. Complete survival period. 3. Submit medical reports and diagnosis certificate. 4. Lump-sum payout to the insured.
riders_addons: Second Medical Opinion from global experts
categories.tax_savings: Premiums qualify for deduction under Section 80D of the Income Tax Act.
categories.free_look_period: 15 days for standard policies to review the illness list.
categories.renewal_terms: Annual renewal. Most plans offer life-long renewability, while some may end at age 65 or 70.

categories.name: Car Insurance
categories.eligibility: Any individual or organization owning a registered car in India. Owner must have a valid DL.
benefits: Third-party liability coverage (Mandatory by law).
Own Damage coverage for theft, accident, fire, and natural disasters.
Personal Accident cover for the owner-driver.
Add-ons like Zero Depreciation and Engine Protect.
Cashless repairs at 5000+ authorized network garages.
categories.waiting_period: No waiting period. Coverage for accidents and theft starts immediately.
exclusions: Driving without a valid license or under influence of alcohol.
Mechanical or electrical breakdown not caused by accident.
Normal wear and tear and aging of the vehicle.
Usage outside the geographical area or for illegal purposes.
categories.claim_process: 1. Inform insurer immediately. 2. Surveyor inspects damage. 3. Cashless repair at network garage or reimbursement. 4. FIR required for theft/third-party injury.
documents_required: FIR (if third-party is involved or theft)
Estimate of repairs from the garage
categories.tax_savings: No tax benefits for personal cars. Business owners can claim premiums as a business expense to reduce taxable income.
categories.free_look_period: Not standard for annual motor policies; usually applies to multi-year policies only.
categories.renewal_terms: Annual renewal required. Policy expires if not renewed. No Claim Bonus (NCB) is lost if not renewed within 90 days of expiry.

categories.name: Bike Insurance
categories.eligibility: Registered owner of a two-wheeler. Rider must have a valid driving license.
benefits: Protection against third-party legal liabilities.
Coverage for damage to the bike due to accidents or theft.
Personal accident cover for the rider.
Quick claim settlement and instant digital policy issuance.
No Claim Bonus (NCB) benefits for claim-free years.
categories.waiting_period: Immediate coverage for accidents and theft upon policy issuance.
exclusions: Normal wear and tear of tires, tubes, and other parts.
Driving without a valid two-wheeler license.
Consequential loss not directly resulting from an accident.
Intentional damage to the vehicle.
categories.claim_process: 1. Report accident/theft via app or call. 2. Submit digital photos and documents. 3. Inspection by surveyor. 4. Settlement or cashless repair.
documents_required: Driving License of the person riding the bike
FIR for theft or third-party injury/death
riders_addons: Personal Accident Cover for Pillion Rider
categories.tax_savings: Business use allows the insurance premium to be treated as a tax-deductible business expense.
categories.free_look_period: Generally not applicable for standard annual motor insurance.
categories.renewal_terms: Renew annually. Multi-year policies (2-3 years) are available to avoid annual renewal and price hikes.

categories.name: Commercial Vehicle Insurance
categories.eligibility: Owners of trucks, buses, taxis, and trailers used for business purposes with valid permits.
benefits: Coverage for loss or damage to the commercial vehicle.
Protection against third-party property damage and bodily injury.
Owner-driver personal accident cover.
Protection for goods being carried (with specific cargo add-ons).
Towing and emergency assistance for heavy vehicles.
categories.waiting_period: No waiting period. Coverage starts as per policy start date.
exclusions: Using the vehicle for purposes other than what is mentioned in the permit.
Overloading the vehicle beyond the specified weight capacity.
Driving by an unauthorized person or without a commercial license.
War, invasion, and nuclear risks.
categories.claim_process: 1. Notify insurer. 2. Mandatory FIR for all commercial claims. 3. Detailed survey of vehicle and cargo (if applicable). 4. Final settlement based on survey report.
documents_required: Commercial Driving License of the driver
riders_addons: Legal Liability to Paid Driver and Cleaner
categories.tax_savings: Insurance premiums for commercial vehicles are a fully deductible business expense under the Income Tax Act.
categories.free_look_period: Rarely applicable for commercial motor insurance.
categories.renewal_terms: Annual renewal. Strict adherence to vehicle fitness and permit validity is required for active coverage.
